notCovered: No destructive or mutating communications actions were clicked: create/edit/archive/channel message/read notification/start call were intentionally not exercised in this read-only atom.
No /calls/[roomId] runtime traversal; this atom covers top-level /communications route cluster only.
No direct API contract mutation checks; network evidence is from browser page loads only.
notes: This is evidence-only and read-only: source files, reconciliation-matrix, commits, and pushes were not touched.
A route is not marked pass solely from navigation; each route includes screenshot and route-specific network evidence.
Existing running dev servers were reused after /login and /health checks; fresh seed/migrate was not needed for this read-only route traversal.
